name: 39_Drug_Response_Prediction_SVM_GDSC_ML
query: Tengeneza mfumo wa kutabiri mwitikio wa dawa ukitumia seti ya data ya GDSC na regressor ya Support Vector Machine (SVM). Pakia seti ya data na fanya uteuzi wa vipengele ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza regressor ya SVM katika `src/model.py`. Tumia uthibitishaji wa msalaba kutathmini utendaji wa mfano katika `src/train.py`. Hifadhi matokeo ya utendaji katika `results/metrics/performance.txt`. Onyesha matokeo ya regression ukitumia seaborn na uhifadhi chini ya `results/figures/`. Kisha, tengeneza ripoti ikijumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, mchakato wa tathmini, na uonyeshaji. Hifadhi ripoti kama `results/drug_response_prediction_report.pdf`. Ripoti inapaswa kusisitiza jinsi uteuzi wa vipengele unavyoathiri utendaji wa mfano, na uonyeshaji wa matokeo ya regression unapaswa kuonyesha wazi uhusiano kati ya vipengele vilivyochaguliwa na mwitikio wa dawa uliotabiriwa. Hakikisha mfumo umeundwa kuwa rahisi kupanuliwa kwa kujumuisha seti za data za ziada au vipengele vipya.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya mwitikio wa dawa "GDSC" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.
Matokeo ya regression yanaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

Ripoti inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, mchakato wa tathmini, na uonyeshaji wa matokeo ya regression, inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/drug_response_prediction_report.pdf`.

preferences.criteria: Ripoti inapaswa kusisitiza jinsi uteuzi wa vipengele unavyoathiri utendaji wa mfano.
Uonyeshaji wa matokeo ya regression unapaswa kuonyesha wazi uhusiano kati ya vipengele vilivyochaguliwa na mwitikio wa dawa uliotabiriwa.
Hakikisha kwamba mfumo unaweza kupanuliwa kwa urahisi ili kujumuisha seti za data za ziada au vipengele vipya bila kazi kubwa ya upya.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya mwitikio wa dawa "GDSC" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file contains a hardcoded placeholder path (`'path_to_gdsc_dataset.csv'`) and a placeholder target column name (`'target'`). There is no evidence in the provided code or trajectory that the actual GDSC dataset (`gdsc_dataset.csv`, which exists in the workspace root) is successfully loaded by this script. The function is defined but not demonstrated to be executed with the correct dataset path and parameters.

judge_stats.criteria: Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>
The `src/data_loader.py` file contains a function `load_and_select_features` that explicitly performs feature selection using `SelectKBest` with `f_regression` to identify important features. The code loads a dataset, separates features and target, applies the selector, and returns the selected features. The workspace structure confirms the existence of the data loader file, and the trajectory evidence indicates it executed without errors during the feature selection operation.

<SATISFIED>
The `src/model.py` file contains a function `train_svm_regressor` that explicitly implements an SVM regressor using `sklearn.svm.SVR` within a pipeline that includes a `StandardScaler`. The code is valid and the trajectory evidence confirms the file was executed, uploaded, and reinstalled without any reported errors, indicating successful implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>
The `src/train.py` file explicitly implements cross-validation using `cross_val_score` from `sklearn.model_selection` with 5 folds and the 'neg_mean_squared_error' scoring metric, which is then converted to RMSE. The code structure shows the model evaluation is performed via cross-validation, satisfying the requirement.

<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement is to have performance results saved in `results/metrics/performance.txt`. The provided content of that file is `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which indicates the file contains only a placeholder string and a `None` value, not actual performance metrics or evaluation results. This does not satisfy the requirement for storing meaningful performance outcomes.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya regression yanaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>
The code in `train.py` explicitly uses seaborn (`sns.histplot`) to create a histogram with KDE for the RMSE scores and saves the resulting figure to `'results/figures/rmse_scores.png'`. The workspace structure shows the `results/figures/` directory exists, and the trajectory evidence confirms the plot was generated and saved successfully without errors.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, mchakato wa tathmini, na uonyeshaji wa matokeo ya regression, inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/drug_response_prediction_report.pdf`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>
The requirement is fully satisfied. The project workspace contains a `results/drug_response_prediction_report.pdf` file. The extracted content from this PDF report explicitly details the data preprocessing (loading GDSC dataset, feature selection), model training (SVM regressor implementation with pipeline), model evaluation (5-fold cross-validation, RMSE calculation), and results visualization (histogram of RMSE scores). The report's structure and the described processes align perfectly with the requirement for a comprehensive report covering these aspects. The trajectory evidence further confirms the successful creation and saving of this report without errors.
